headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Darden Restaurants, Raises Price Target to $228
summary: Keybanc  analyst Christopher Carril   maintains Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $226 to $228.

raw.headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Darden Restaurants, Raises Price Target to $228
